title: 2023-2025 Toyota Prius Hybrid, Prius Prime - How To Activate Engine Inspection And Maintenance Mode
description: Master Technician Viktor G shows the DIY procedure of how to make the gasoline engine run all the time for bleeding engine coolant etc.

items.name: If you end up needing any diagnosis on your vehicle in the future, here is the Autel bidirectional scan tool that I use myself and would recommend
